skill_availability_goal: Verifies that trd-gen owns completing a missing or stale TRD after another skill reports a clear gap packet.
prompt: feature-implementor 发现 docs/engineer/capture-loop/TRD.md 缺失，已交回 TRD gap packet：需要决定受影响组件、Capture 事件数据流、队列重试验证命令、发布/回滚风险和错误处理策略。PM 的 docs/pm/capture-loop/PRD.md 已确认。请进入 trd-gen，不要写代码。
